title: Rated - Liverpool's six signings from record summer spree
summary: BBC Sport assessed the impact of Liverpool's record six summer signings that cost £415m combined, evaluating how each arrival has performed in their new roles.
content: BBC Sport assesses the impact made by Liverpool's six signings last summer that totalled a record £415m.

zh.title: 评分 - 利物浦创纪录夏季转会的六笔签约

title: Why reluctant 'guru' says Dutch will win World Cup
summary: Economist Joachim Klement's World Cup forecasting model has achieved a 100% success rate since 2014; he reveals his prediction for the 2026 tournament winner.
content: Economist Joachim Klement developed a forecast model which has kept a 100% record of predicting World Cup winners since 2014 - who does he think will win in 2026?

zh.title: 为什么不愿做"大师"的经济学家说荷兰将赢得世界杯
zh.summary: 经济学家约阿希姆·克莱门特的世界杯预测模型自2014年以来保持100%的准确率；他透露了对2026年世界杯冠军的预测。

title: Roberts and Davies return from injury for Wales
summary: Wales defender Ben Davies returns from a serious ankle injury while winger Connor Roberts is set to feature after missing a year, ahead of matches against Ghana and Romania.
content: Ben Davies returns from a serious ankle injury while Connor Roberts could play his first game in a year for Wales against Ghana and Romania.

zh.title: 罗伯茨和戴维斯伤愈复出代表威尔士

title: Tranmere appoint Clarke as new manager
summary: Darrell Clarke has been appointed as Tranmere's new manager on a two-year contract at the Prenton Park club.
content: Darrell Clarke signs a two-year contract to become the new manager at the Prenton Park club.

zh.title: 特兰米尔任命克拉克为新主教练

title: How does World Sevens Football work?
summary: BBC explains the rules, participating teams, and viewing options for World Sevens Football, the emerging seven-a-side international format.
content: Our Ask Me Anything team explains how World Sevens Football works, which teams are involved, and how you can follow it.

title: 'He showed why good managers need time' - who are this season's over-achievers?
summary: Tony Pulis identifies which Premier League and lower division managers have overachieved this season, highlighting those who impressed despite expectations.
content: Tony Pulis explains which Premier League managers have impressed him this season and, down the divisions, who else stands out.

title: Premier League quiz: Name every title-winning manager
summary: A Premier League trivia challenge tests knowledge of every title-winning manager in the division's history, with Pep Guardiola departing as the second-most successful.
content: Pep Guardiola leaves the Premier League as the division's second-most successful manager.

title: Rookie manager Clark makes famous dad his assistant
summary: Nicky Clark, the former Rangers and Dundee United striker, appoints his father Sandy as assistant manager for his managerial debut with Queen of the South.
content: Nicky Clark appoints his father Sandy as an assistant as the former Rangers and Dundee United striker starts his first management job with Queen of the South.

title: Van Gaal fallout made Di Maria 'hate' Man Utd, but he has no regrets
summary: Angel di Maria reflects on his controversial Manchester United tenure, discussing his conflict with Louis van Gaal and a break-in at his home, while affirming he holds no lasting regrets.
content: Rows and fall-out with Louis van Gaal, hating his club, the break-in but no regrets - Angel di Maria opens up on his time at Man Utd

title: Podcast: Tactics Tuesday & how will Shankland fare at Rangers?
summary: This podcast episode examines Rangers' tactical setup including set pieces and long throws. It questions whether recently signed Shankland can succeed at the club.

title: McTominay backs 'great man' Clarke for Scotland stay
summary: Scotland midfielder Scott McTominay has expressed support for Steve Clarke to remain as national team head coach. McTominay hopes Clarke will extend his contract beyond the upcoming World Cup.
content: Scotland midfielder Scott McTominay "would love that" if Steve Clarke agrees a new contract to extend his stay as head coach beyond this summer's World Cup.

zh.title: 麦克托米奈支持"伟大的人"克拉克继续执教苏格兰
zh.summary: 苏格兰中场斯科特·麦克托米奈表示支持史蒂夫·克拉克继续担任国家队主教练。麦克托米奈希望克拉克将合同延长到即将到来的世界杯之后。

title: 24 Hours with Ella Toone coming soon
summary: A new BBC Sport documentary will offer unprecedented behind-the-scenes access to Manchester United and England star Ella Toone. The film documents her wedding preparations while she copes with the loss of her father.
content: Watch the trailer for a new BBC Sport documentary offering unprecedented behind-the-scenes access to Manchester United and England star Ella Toone as she prepares for her wedding, while still coming to terms with the loss of her father.

zh.title: 《24小时与埃拉·图恩》即将推出
zh.summary: 英国广播公司体育频道的新纪录片将首次深入幕后记录曼彻斯特联队和英格兰球星埃拉·图恩。该纪录片记录了她的婚礼准备过程，同时她在应对失去父亲的悲痛。

title: How Toone is navigating grief through football
summary: Ella Toone discusses her journey through grief and football in a new BBC documentary. The England midfielder opens up about preparing for her wedding without her father.
content: England and Manchester United midfielder Ella Toone opens up about grief, football and preparing for her wedding without her dad in a new BBC documentary.

zh.title: 图恩如何通过足球度过悲伤
